title: Module 1
content:
INTRODUCTION TO FOG COMPUTING:
Fog
Computing-Definition-Characteristics-Application Scenarios
-
Issues -Fog Computing and Internet of Things-Pros and Cons Myths of
Fog Computing -Need and Reasons for Fog Computing Fog Computing
and Edge Computing-IoT, FOG, Cloud Benefits

title: Module 2
content:
ARCHITECTURE:
Working Procedure -Performance Evaluation Components- Software Systems
– Architecture- Modeling and Simulation –Challenges
FOG PROTOCOLS:
Fog Protocol-Fog Kit- Proximity Detection Protocols- DDS/RTPS computing
protocols

title: Module 3
content:
ENERGY HARVESTING WIRELESS SENSORS:
Power sources for WSN – Power generation – conversion – examples – case
studies. Harvesting microelectronic circuits – power conditioning and losses

title: Module 4
content:
SELECTED APPLICATIONS OF ENERGY HARVESTING
SYSTEMS:
Case studies for Implanted medical devices – Bio-MEMS based applications
– harvesting for RF sensors and ID tags – powering wireless SHM sensor
nodes.
